# Myndare
> Myndare is a product studio building quiet, practical AI tools that amplify
> who you are — not replace you.

## Products
### License King (證照王)
- URL: https://myndare.com/licenseking/
- Platform: iOS 18.5+
- Status: Live on App Store (Apple ID 6764019660) since 2026-05-10
- Purpose: Manage professional credentials with OCR, expiration alerts, cloud sync
- Pricing: Free (7 licenses), Personal NT$30/month, Family NT$90/month
- Free trial: 30 days Personal via promo code LICENSEKING30
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/tw/app/id6764019660

### PM Simulator (專案經理模擬器)
- URL: https://myndare.com/products/pm-simulator.html
- Purpose: RPG-style project management learning game

## About
- Founder: Wade Wang, PMP certified, 8+ years PM experience
- Contact: hello@myndare.com
- Language: Traditional Chinese (zh-TW)

## Blog Topics
- Professional license management and renewal
- PMP certification and renewal (PDU tracking)
- Project management skills and WBS
- Taiwan professional certification guides

## Blog Articles
- https://myndare.com/blog/ai-will-replace-you.html — AI 時代的生存策略：能力比輸出重要，專業證照是你對世界的說明書
- https://myndare.com/blog/av-integration-pitfalls.html — 會議室 AV 系統整合最常踩的 5 個坑，與 8 年實戰經驗的避坑建議
- https://myndare.com/blog/license-king-story.html — 工程主管管理十幾人的證照到期日的痛點，催生證照王 LicenseKing 的開發故事
- https://myndare.com/blog/pm-first-day.html — 專案經理第一天上班的 7 個實戰建議：先聽、後問、建立可信任感
- https://myndare.com/blog/pmp-renewal-guide.html — PMP 證照過期完整救援指南：60 天寬限期、60 PDU 快速取得管道
- https://myndare.com/blog/taiwan-license-renewal.html — 台灣常見專業證照換證週期整理：PMP、消防、室內設計、技術士等三大類
- https://myndare.com/blog/wbs-common-mistakes.html — 專案延期根本原因：WBS 拆解的 3 個常見錯誤與實戰修正方法
- https://myndare.com/blog/why-you-need-license-management-tool.html — 為什麼需要個人證照管理工具？分析 Excel、行事曆、紙本的侷限
